race.comment: CASPERNOVA (10) has been thereabouts without threatening in his three runs this time in work. Made late ground to finish midfield in a similar race here three weeks ago. Distance specialist who can return to form without surprising. ISTOLEA MERC (13) charged home to win impressively first-up over 1100m at Canterbury. Should hold that form in what looks an easier assignment. TOWN CRIER (5) led for home only to be gunned down by subsequent winner Soothsayer here at this trip recently. Ready to peak at the third run back from a spell. NAVYONTHEHIGHWAY (4) has been freshened up and is better placed back in Benchmark company.
